name: Sticky Header
description: A container that remains fixed at the top of the scrollable area.

guidelines.purpose: Sticky Header is used to keep important navigation or interaction elements visible as the user scrolls through long content lists.

anatomy.container: position: sticky, top: 0, z-index: 20, background: var(--color-background-white), box-shadow: 0 var(--border-width-100) 0 var(--color-background-tertiary).

usage_guidelines: Use for search bars, category tabs, or context-specific navigation that should remain accessible at all times.
